HomePage.title: Welcome to The Active Route Event Calendar!
HomePage.description: Find your next event at your fingertips. Filter, discover, and join the action!

AboutPage.title: About The Active Route
AboutPage.mission: This site brings together biking, running and outdoor event listings, with a focus on events held in Türkiye.
AboutPage.vision: We support healthy habits by making it easy to find local events and activities that get people moving.
AboutPage.howWeHelp: By connecting event organizers and participants, we help build stronger local communities, promote volunteer opportunities, and highlight accessible activities for all ages and abilities.
AboutPage.note: We aggregate event information to help participants discover and join local activities. This is a community-driven listing and may not be exhaustive.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.description: For questions, corrections, or event submissions, reach out to us. Your feedback is valuable!
ContactPage.submitNote: To submit an event, email the details (name, date, location, URL) and we'll review and add it to the calendar.
ContactPage.privacyNote: We will not share your email address publicly. Messages are used only to curate and improve the listing.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.introduction: The Active Route — Effective date: May 2026.
PrivacyPage.info: We automatically collect technical data such as IP address and browser information. We also collect any information you provide (for example, via the contact form or email).
PrivacyPage.use: To provide event listings, analyze traffic, and serve relevant advertisements.
PrivacyPage.cookies: We use cookies and tracking technologies, including Google AdSense, to provide and improve our services and to serve ads.
PrivacyPage.thirdParty: We may share data with third parties, including Google, for ad serving and analytics.
PrivacyPage.rights: You may contact us to request deletion of your personal data; we will respond and take appropriate action.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.agreementText: By accessing The Active Route (the "Website"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the site immediately.
TermsPage.natureText:
The Active Route is an informational directory for outdoor events (biking, hiking, running).

We are not event organizers.

We do not sell tickets directly.

We provide links to third-party organizers for your convenience.
TermsPage.accuracyText: While we strive for precision, event details (dates, times, locations, entry fees) are subject to change by the organizers without notice. The Active Route does not warrant the completeness or accuracy of any listing. Always verify event details on the official organizer’s website before traveling or registering.
TermsPage.liabilityText: Outdoor activities carry inherent risks of injury, disability, or death. You acknowledge that participating in any event listed on this Website is done at your own risk. The Active Route, its owners, and its affiliates shall not be held liable for any physical injury, property damage, or financial loss resulting from your participation in an event found via our platform. We are not responsible for the safety standards or conduct of third-party event organizers.
TermsPage.ipText: The curated database of events, site design, and original content on The Active Route are protected by copyright. You may not scrape, crawl, or redistribute our data for commercial purposes without explicit written consent.
TermsPage.externalText: Our Service contains links to third-party websites. We have no control over the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites and assume no responsibility for them.
TermsPage.changesText: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason our site is unavailable at any time.
TermsPage.governingText: These terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which the Website owner operates, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
TermsPage.contactText: For legal inquiries, please contact: theactiveroute@gmail.com
